assessment_objectives.objective: enhanced personnel screening for individuals is defined.
the frequency with which to reassess individual positions and access to sensitive / regulated data is defined.
individuals that require enhanced personnel screening are identified.
positions that require access to sensitive / regulated data are identified.
enhanced personnel screening is conducted for individuals.
individual positions and access to sensitive / regulated data is reassessed per an organization-defined frequency.
individuals with access to sensitive / regulated data are identified.
adverse information about individuals with access to sensitive / regulated data is defined.
organizational systems to which individuals have access are identified.
mechanisms are in place to protect organizational systems if adverse information develops or is obtained about individuals with access to sensitive / regulated data.
individuals accessing a system, application or service processing, storing or transmitting sensitive / regulated data are cleared.

individuals accessing a system, application or service processing, storing or transmitting sensitive / regulated data are indoctrinated to the highest classification level of the information to which they have access on the system.

additional personnel screening criteria to be satisfied for individuals accessing a system, application or service processing, storing or transmitting information requiring special protection are defined.

individuals accessing a system, application or service processing, storing or transmitting information requiring special protection have valid access authorizations that are demonstrated by assigned duties.
individuals accessing a system, application or service processing, storing or transmitting information requiring special protection satisfy additional personnel screening criteria.
conditions that require the rescreening of individuals are defined.
